2605.03609.title: Where Paths Split: Localized, Calibrated Control of Moral Reasoning in Large Language Models
2605.03609.paper_summary: Large language models often display heterogeneous moral preferences across settings. We study inference-time steering toward a desired ethical framework while preserving general competence. We present Convergent-Divergent Routing, which traces and edits minimal branch points inside transformer blocks where ethical-framework-related pathways first converge and then diverge. Gating non-target branches at these loci blocks the downstream propagation while leaving upstream computations intact. We find that this intervention alone increases targeted ethical-framework reasoning. To achieve fine-grained control, we adapt Common Spatial Patterns to the residual stream and extract, for each branch-point layer, a pair of directions that discriminate between utilitarian and deontological frameworks. We then introduce Dual Logit Calibration, a closed-form, minimum-$\ell_2$-norm update that moves the residual within this two-dimensional subspace so the resulting directional projections align with user-specified preference weights. Experiments on real-life moral dilemmas show that our method reliably achieves preference calibration and largely preserves general capabilities, outperforming recent baselines while providing an interpretable mechanism.
2605.03609.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在不同環境中常常顯示出異質的道德偏好。<lb/>我們研究在推理時期朝向所需的倫理框架進行引導，同時保持一般能力。<lb/>我們提出了收斂-發散路由，該方法追蹤並編輯Transformer區塊內的最小分支點，在這些地方與倫理框架相關的路徑首先會聚然後發散。<lb/>在這些位置對非目標分支進行閘控可以阻止下游傳播，同時保持上游計算不變。<lb/>我們發現僅此干預就能提高針對性的倫理框架推理。<lb/>為了實現更精細的控制，我們將常見空間模式調整到殘差流中，並為每個分支點層提取一對方向，以區分功利主義和義務論框架。<lb/>然後，我們引入雙重邏輯校準，這是一種封閉形式的最小-$\ell_2$-範數更新，將殘差移動到這個二維子空間內，使得結果的方向投影與用戶指定的偏好權重對齊。<lb/>在現實道德困境上的實驗顯示，我們的方法可靠地實現了偏好校準，並在很大程度上保留了一般能力，超越了最近的基準，同時提供了一個可解釋的機制。
2605.03609.author: Chenchen Yuan et.al.
2605.03609.authors: Chenchen Yuan, Zheyu Zhang, Gjergji Kasneci
